Inflatable Rentals in Atlantic Canada

For larger events, schools, festivals, fairs, and community celebrations, Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia and can quote selected larger Atlantic Canada events by availability, travel distance, staffing, and setup requirements. Travel quoted separately.

Atlantic Canada quotes are reviewed case by case for travel, staffing, setup suitability, ferry or distance considerations, weather, availability, and event scale. We do not operate local branches across Atlantic Canada.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Rush 42 - Large Inflatable, $450, Wet-use - Large 42ft water slide and obstacle course combo.
  • Crown Quest - Obstacle Course, $289, Dry-use - Obstacle course attraction for bigger event energy.
  • Crown Axe Challenge - Interactive Game, $180, Dry-use - Inflatable axe throwing for friendly competition.
  • Crown Kick Darts - Interactive Game, $160, Dry-use - Giant inflatable football darts game for all ages.

Best For

  • Larger events
  • Schools
  • Festivals
  • Corporate events

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you serve all of Atlantic Canada?
Nova Kingdom Rentals can quote select Atlantic Canada events by availability, travel distance, staffing, setup requirements, and event size. Availability is not guaranteed.
Are inflatable rentals available throughout Atlantic Canada?
Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, NS and serves selected larger events across Atlantic Canada by quote. Travel cost, setup suitability, and availability are confirmed before booking.
Are bookings confirmed after submitting an online request?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Nova Kingdom Rentals confirms availability, travel cost, setup suitability, and deposit details before any booking is finalized.
What is the wind limit for inflatables?
Inflatables must not be used when sustained winds exceed 38 km/h. Use must stop immediately if winds reach or exceed this limit.

Request an Atlantic Canada event quote
